name: Bot Comms | Stage Language for Permit Webhooks
description: Sends SMS and email updates about the permitting phase to projects in the pipeline with known permit submission and AHJ details, providing weekly status and timelines.
uuid: Bot Comms | Stage Language for Permit Webhooks-1661567337

value.staticValue:
Hello, this is Olivia with Photon Brothers. You’re now in the Permitting & Interconnection phase, where we submit applications to your utility and local building department (AHJ). Timelines of approval can vary from days to months, depending on the jurisdiction. 

We’ll send weekly updates to keep you informed of your project, even if the update is just that things are still under review. We’re tracking everything closely and will let you know as soon as there’s progress. 

Thanks for your patience!

Reply END to stop texts.

You’re now in the Permitting & Interconnection phase of your project—this is where we submit applications to your utility and local building department (AHJ) for approval.

Timelines for approval can vary quite a bit depending on your utility and jurisdiction—some take just days or weeks, others can take longer.

We will be keeping you updated with weekly emails on your project status. Sometimes the update may be that things are still under review, but rest assured, we’re actively monitoring your project and will let you know as soon as there’s progress.

We appreciate your patience and look forward to providing updates. Please let us know if you have any questions.

Best,
Photon Brothers

Hello, this is Olivia with Photon Brothers. Your project is still in the Permitting & Interconnection phase and is currently under review.

We submitted your application to [[Utility/AHJ Name]] on [[Submission Date]]. Based on recent averages, approvals from this agency typically take about [[Avg Timeline]]. While there’s no new update this week, we’re actively monitoring your project and will notify you as soon as we hear back. Thanks again for your patience!

Reply END to stop texts.

We're just checking in with an update on your project with Photon Brothers. Your project is currently in the Permitting & Interconnection phase, and your application is still under review.

We submitted your permitting documents to [[Utility/AHJ Name]] on [[Submission Date]]. Based on recent averages, approvals from this agency typically take about [[Avg Timeline]]. While there are no updates to report this week, please know that we’re closely tracking your project and will notify you once we receive any information.

We appreciate your patience during this part of the process. Please let us know if you have any questions.

Best,
